# Vellvii - Full Content for AI Crawlers

> Luxury intimate wellness brand creating discreet, refined products and biometric storage for modern couples. American premium wellness house.

This file is a long-form, plain-text content dump for AI assistants
(ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) that prefer ingestible text over
parsing a single-page-app shell. It mirrors the public site content as
of the last refresh.

---

## About Vellvii

Vellvii is an American premium wellness house designing the world's
first biometric storage and docking system for intimate wellness,
alongside a curated Pleasure Collection of design-led devices. Quiet
luxury, by intent.

Brand mantra: "The Art of 'O'".

Vellvii currently ships to the United States only. We are actively
working to expand to additional regions. All Vellvii shipments are
prepared in plain, unbranded packaging with no external reference to
contents or to Vellvii.

Contact: info@vellvii.com
Website: https://vellvii.com

---

## Product: Vellvii DOX

URL: https://vellvii.com/products/vellvii-dox

The Vellvii DOX is a biometric sex toy lock box and bedroom storage
hub - the centerpiece of the Vellvii Pleasure Collection.

- Exterior: faux leather with rose gold hardware
- Interior: velvet-lined with a movable velvet-lined tray for smaller items
- Access: integrated biometric fingerprint lock supporting up to 10 prints
- Power: external USB-C input feeding 3 internal USB-A charging ports
- Top-mounted suction stations (sold separately): VDS and DDS turn the
  DOX itself into a refined stand for compatible suction-base pieces

The DOX is designed to live discreetly in a refined bedroom interior.
No overt branding. No obvious silhouettes.

---

## Product: Vellvii Lux

URL: https://vellvii.com/products/vellvii-lux

The Vellvii Lux is a portable fingerprint-lock storage case - a refined
sex toy bag designed for travel-friendly privacy and everyday personal
storage.

- Exterior: genuine Italian leather
- Interior: velvet-lined
- Access: biometric fingerprint lock
- Power: external USB-C input feeding 2 internal USB-A charging ports
- Sized like a refined toiletries case for discreet travel

Lux is a separate portable case and is NOT part of the DOX docking
system.

---

## Products: G-Vibe, Evolve, Pulse

URLs:
- https://vellvii.com/products/vellvii-g-vibe
- https://vellvii.com/products/vellvii-evolve
- https://vellvii.com/products/vellvii-pulse

The Vellvii G-Vibe, Evolve, and Pulse are refined pleasure pieces in
the Vellvii Pleasure Collection. All three are DOX-compatible through
the VDS suction mount that sits atop the Vellvii DOX.

---

## The DOX Docking System

The DOX uses two distinct top-mounted suction stations:

- **VDS (Vellvii Docking Station)**: a suction-base mounting station
  shaped for current Vellvii products with suction bases (G-Vibe,
  Evolve, Pulse). With the VDS in place, the DOX itself becomes the
  mount.

- **DDS (Dildo Docking Station)**: a round suction-base mounting
  station that supports compatible third-party suction-base products
  up to 90mm (approximately 3.5 inches) in diameter. The DDS is not a
  universal mount; products larger than 90mm in diameter will not fit.

The VDS and DDS are external mounts that sit atop the DOX. They are
NOT internal shaped inserts.

---

## Warranty

URL: https://vellvii.com/warranty

Vellvii offers a limited warranty covering manufacturing defects.

- Registration is required within 7 days of delivery to activate coverage
- Remedies are repair or replacement only
- Registration generates a WR- ID for the owner's records
- All sales are final - no refunds

---

## Shipping & Delivery

Vellvii currently ships to the United States only. We are actively
expanding to additional regions. All shipments are sent in plain,
unbranded packaging. Tracking is provided. Dispatch windows differ for
in-stock vs pre-order items - see Terms of Service for current detail.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Vellvii?**
Vellvii is an American premium wellness house designing the world's
first biometric storage and docking system for intimate wellness,
alongside a curated Pleasure Collection of design-led devices.

**What is the DOX made of?**
The DOX pairs a faux leather exterior with a velvet interior, an
integrated biometric fingerprint lock, and 3 internal USB-A charging
ports powered through an external USB-C input.

**What materials is the Vellvii Lux made from?**
The Vellvii Lux is a portable case crafted with a genuine leather
exterior and a velvet-lined interior, with 2 internal USB-A charging
ports powered through an external USB-C input.

**Are Vellvii products discreet?**
Yes. Every Vellvii product is designed to look at home in a considered
interior - no overt branding, no obvious silhouettes. The DOX and Lux
both lock biometrically so nothing inside is ever on display.

**How does the Vellvii ecosystem work?**
The DOX is the centerpiece - biometric storage with integrated internal
USB-A charging and the VDS and DDS suction-base mounting stations on
top. The Pleasure Collection (Pulse, Vibe, G-Vibe) is engineered to
live inside it.

**Is there a warranty?**
Yes. Vellvii offers a limited warranty covering manufacturing defects.
Registration is required within 7 days of delivery. Remedies are
repair or replacement only.

**Where can I buy Vellvii?**
Vellvii is currently available exclusively through our online store at
vellvii.com. Authorized retail partnerships are in process.

**When do Prelaunch orders ship?**
As communicated, all Kickstarter and Prelaunch clients are expected to
receive their ordered products in July 2026.

docking system. See https://vellvii.com/guides for the full index.
